Display large.description: Common use cases: Hero sections. Huge impact text for landing page titles.

Emphasized display large.description: Common use cases: Hero sections. Huge impact text for landing page titles. (Emphasized)

Display medium.description: Common use cases: Section splashes. Large, expressive headers for high-impact content.

Emphasized display medium.description: Common use cases: Section splashes. Large, expressive headers for high-impact content. (Emphasized)

Display small.description: Common use cases: Feature intros. Strong headline for secondary hero elements.

Emphasized display small.description: Common use cases: Feature intros. Strong headline for secondary hero elements. (Emphasized)

Headline large.description: Common use cases: H1 elements. Primary page headings and major article titles.

Emphasized headline large.description: Common use cases: H1 elements. Primary page headings and major article titles. (Emphasized)

Headline medium.description: Common use cases: H2 elements. Secondary section headings.

Emphasized headline medium.description: Common use cases: H2 elements. Secondary section headings. (Emphasized)

Headline small.description: Common use cases: H3 elements. Sub-section headings and modal titles.

Emphasized headline small.description: Common use cases: H3 elements. Sub-section headings and modal titles. (Emphasized)

Title large.description: Common use cases: App bar / navigation titles. High-visibility component headers.

Emphasized title large.description: Common use cases: App bar / navigation titles. High-visibility component headers. (Emphasized)

Title medium.description: Common use cases: Card titles. Standard headers for cards and list item groups.

Emphasized title medium.description: Common use cases: Card titles. Standard headers for cards and list item groups. (Emphasized)

Title small.description: Common use cases: Small components. Nested list headers or secondary card titles.

Emphasized title small.description: Common use cases: Small components. Nested list headers or secondary card titles. (Emphasized)

Body large.description: Common use cases: Primary reading. Main paragraph text for blogs and long-form content.

Emphasized body large.description: Common use cases: Primary reading. Main paragraph text for blogs and long-form content. (Emphasized)

Body medium.description: Common use cases: Standard content. Default text for descriptions and metadata.

Emphasized body medium.description: Common use cases: Standard content. Default text for descriptions and metadata. (Emphasized)

Body small.description: Common use cases: Fine print. Footers, legal disclaimers, and secondary metadata.

Emphasized body small.description: Common use cases: Fine print. Footers, legal disclaimers, and secondary metadata. (Emphasized)

Label large.description: Common use cases: Interactive elements. Text inside buttons, tabs, and navigation rails.

Emphasized label large.description: Common use cases: Interactive elements. Text inside buttons, tabs, and navigation rails. (Emphasized)

Label medium.description: Common use cases: Form controls. Labels for inputs (`<label>`), chips, and badges.

Emphasized label medium.description: Common use cases: Form controls. Labels for inputs (`<label>`), chips, and badges. (Emphasized)

Label small.description: Common use cases: Captions / overlines. Tiny hints, tooltips, and image captions.

Emphasized label small.description: Common use cases: Captions / overlines. Tiny hints, tooltips, and image captions. (Emphasized)

Primary.description: Common use cases: High-emphasis. Primary buttons, active states, and prominent brand icons.

On primary.description: Common use cases: Content on primary. Text and icons displayed against the primary color.

Primary container.description: Common use cases: Medium-emphasis. Large prominent containers like FABs or active search bars.

On primary container.description: Common use cases: Content on primary container. High-contrast text for primary containers.

Secondary.description: Common use cases: Secondary actions. Filter chips, toggle switches, and less-intense buttons.

On secondary.description: Common use cases: Content on secondary. Text/icons for secondary elements.

Secondary container.description: Common use cases: Subtle highlights. Backgrounds for selected items in lists or navigation.

On secondary container.description: Common use cases: Content on secondary container. Text for subtle accent areas.

Tertiary.description: Common use cases: Input highlights. Used for "call to action" or tertiary brand accents.

On tertiary.description: Common use cases: Content on tertiary. Text/icons for tertiary elements.

Tertiary container.description: Common use cases: Specific highlights. Unique badges or notification dots.

On tertiary container.description: Common use cases: Content on tertiary container. Deep text for tertiary accents.

Error.description: Common use cases: Critical alerts. Destructive buttons (Delete), error icons, and invalid text.

On error.description: Common use cases: Content on error. Text/icons on high-emphasis error backgrounds.

Error container.description: Common use cases: Error banners. Large warning backgrounds at the top of forms.

On error container.description: Common use cases: Content on error container. Error message text within banners.

Background.description: Common use cases: App background. The foundational color under all other content.

On background.description: Common use cases: Body text. Main text color for long-form reading on the background.

Surface.description: Common use cases: Generic surfaces. Default background for cards, sheets, and dialogs.

On surface.description: Common use cases: Surface text. Main content color for text sitting on surface elements.

Surface variant.description: Common use cases: Decorative surfaces. Backgrounds for inputs or unselected component states.

On surface variant.description: Common use cases: Low-emphasis text. Metadata, captions, and secondary icon colors.

Surface bright.description: Common use cases: High-visibility. A surface that is always bright, regardless of light/dark mode.

Surface dim.description: Common use cases: Low-visibility. A dimmed surface for backgrounding content.

Surface container lowest.description: Common use cases: Clean backdrop. Used for the most "distant" layer in the UI.

Surface container low.description: Common use cases: Minimal separation. Subtle card backgrounds on a flat page.

Surface container.description: Common use cases: Standard container. The default role for most cards and UI blocks.

Surface container high.description: Common use cases: Raised areas. Side drawers, floating search bars, or headers.

Surface container highest.description: Common use cases: Top-level layers. Modals, dialogs, and tooltips.

Primary fixed.description: Common use cases: Static branding. Brand colors that stay consistent in light/dark themes.

On primary fixed.description: Common use cases: Text on fixed. Main text for fixed-theme brand elements.

Primary fixed dim.description: Common use cases: Dark-mode fixed. A muted version of primary-fixed for dark themes.

On primary fixed variant.description: Common use cases: Emphasis on fixed. Secondary text/icons on fixed backgrounds.

Secondary fixed.description: Common use cases: Static accents. Secondary brand colors that don't flip themes.

On secondary fixed.description: Common use cases: Text on secondary fixed. Standard text for fixed secondary areas.

Secondary fixed dim.description: Common use cases: Dark-mode fixed. Muted secondary for dark theme consistency.

On secondary fixed variant.description: Common use cases: Emphasis on fixed. Detail text on fixed secondary containers.

Tertiary fixed.description: Common use cases: Static tertiary. Tertiary brand colors that remain constant.

On tertiary fixed.description: Common use cases: Text on tertiary fixed. Main text for fixed tertiary elements.

Tertiary fixed dim.description: Common use cases: Dark-mode fixed. Muted tertiary for dark theme consistency.

On tertiary fixed variant.description: Common use cases: Emphasis on fixed. Detail text on fixed tertiary containers.

Outline.description: Common use cases: Borders. Standard visible boundaries for text fields and chips.

Outline variant.description: Common use cases: Dividers. Very subtle lines for horizontal rules or list separators.

Shadow.description: Common use cases: Depth. The color used for box-shadows (usually black/neutral).

Scrim.description: Common use cases: Overlays. The semi-transparent dark layer behind a modal.

Surface tint.description: Common use cases: Color toning. Used to apply brand-colored tints to surfaces at high elevations.

Inverse surface.description: Common use cases: High contrast. Snackbars or floating "undo" banners.

Inverse on surface.description: Common use cases: Inverse text. High-contrast text for snackbars.

Inverse primary.description: Common use cases: Inverse accent. Primary-colored buttons inside an inverse surface (e.g., on a snackbar).

Level1.description: Common use cases: Minimal lift. Standard cards, unselected filter chips, and low-profile components. Provides just enough shadow to separate from the background.

Level2.description: Common use cases: Raised. Small floating action buttons (FABs) and components that have been interacted with (hover/focus states of level 1 items).

Level3.description: Common use cases: Prominent. Standard FABs, date pickers, and time pickers. This is the "middle ground" for floating components.

Level4.description: Common use cases: High lift. Search bars in a scrolled state, navigation drawers, and side sheets. Used for large surfaces that slide over the main content.

Level5.description: Common use cases: Maximum lift. Dialogs, modals, tooltips, and context menus. Reserved for elements that require the user's immediate focus and sit at the very top of the stack.

Spring fast spatial.description: Common use cases: Micro-movements. Small-distance translations like toggle switches, button icon bounces, or chip removals.

Spring fast spatial duration.description: Common use cases: Micro-movements. Small-distance translations like toggle switches, button icon bounces, or chip removals. (Duration)

Spring default spatial.description: Common use cases: Standard movement. The go-to pairing for nav drawers, side sheets, and elements moving across a medium portion of the screen.

Spring default spatial duration.description: Common use cases: Standard movement. The go-to pairing for nav drawers, side sheets, and elements moving across a medium portion of the screen. (Duration)

Spring slow spatial.description: Common use cases: Hero transitions. Large layout shifts, such as a card expanding to fill the entire viewport or full-screen entry animations.

Spring slow spatial duration.description: Common use cases: Hero transitions. Large layout shifts, such as a card expanding to fill the entire viewport or full-screen entry animations. (Duration)

Spring fast effects.description: Common use cases: Snappy feedback. Quick opacity or color changes for hover/pressed states and rapid icon swaps.

Spring fast effects duration.description: Common use cases: Snappy feedback. Quick opacity or color changes for hover/pressed states and rapid icon swaps. (Duration)

Spring default effects.description: Common use cases: Standard fades. Default for tooltips appearing or content cross-fading within a container (e.g., tab switching).

Spring default effects duration.description: Common use cases: Standard fades. Default for tooltips appearing or content cross-fading within a container (e.g., tab switching). (Duration)

Spring slow effects.description: Common use cases: Ambient changes. Gradual background color shifts or complex layered "blur-in" effects where a sudden change would be jarring.

Spring slow effects duration.description: Common use cases: Ambient changes. Gradual background color shifts or complex layered "blur-in" effects where a sudden change would be jarring. (Duration)

None.description: Common use cases: Full-bleed. Edge-to-edge images, banners, or backgrounds that touch the screen boundary.

Extra small.description: Common use cases: Tiny elements. Tooltips, small badges, and micro-interactions.

Small.description: Common use cases: Inputs & controls. Text fields, checkboxes, and small menu items.

Medium.description: Common use cases: Standard components. Default cards, small dialogs, and secondary buttons.

Large.description: Common use cases: Prominent surfaces. Medium-sized cards and standard floating action buttons (FABs).

Large increased.description: Common use cases: High-emphasis cards. Used in expressive layouts to give hero cards a more "contained" and distinct look.

Extra large.description: Common use cases: Large containers. Bottom sheets, navigation drawers, and large modal dialogs.

Extra large increased.description: Common use cases: Expressive sheets. Top-level hero elements or large background containers in high-impact layouts.

Extra extra large.description: Common use cases: Max containers. Used for the largest surfaces, like ultra-wide search bars or full-screen expansion containers.

Full.description: Common use cases: Pills & circles. Standard buttons, chips, and circular icons (avatars).

Typeface plain.description: Common use cases: Typeface for plain variants (Title small/medium, Body, Label)

Typeface base.description: Common use cases: Base typeface for the entire system

Typeface emphasized plain.description: Common use cases: Typeface for emphasized plain variants

Typeface emphasized brand.description: Common use cases: Typeface for emphasized brand variants

Typeface brand.description: Common use cases: Typeface for brand variants (Display, Headline, Title large)

Typeface generic.description: Common use cases: Generic fallback typeface (e.g. sans-serif, serif)

Window compact.description: Common devices for compact window: Phone in portrait

Window medium.description: Common devices for medium window: Tablet in portrait, Foldable in portrait (unfolded)

Window medium and wider.description: Common devices for medium window and larger: Tablet in portrait, Foldable in portrait (unfolded), Desktop

Window medium and narrower.description: Common devices for medium window and smaller: Phone in portrait, Tablet in portrait, Foldable in portrait (unfolded)

Window expanded.description: Common devices for expanded window: Phone in landscape, Tablet in landscape, Foldable in landscape (unfolded), Desktop

Window expanded and wider.description: Common devices for expanded window and larger: Phone in landscape, Tablet in landscape, Desktop

Window expanded and narrower.description: Common devices for expanded window and smaller: Phone, Tablet, Foldable, Desktop

Window large.description: Common devices for large window: Desktop

Window large and wider.description: Common devices for large window and larger: Desktop, Ultra-wide monitors

Window large and narrower.description: Common devices for large window and smaller: All mobile devices, Tablets, Standard Desktop

Window extra large.description: Common devices for extra-large window: Desktop, Ultra-wide monitors

Media Query: Motion No Preference.description: User has made no preference known regarding reducing motion

Media Query: Motion Reduce.description: User has requested the system minimize the amount of non-essential motion

Media Query: Transparency No Preference.description: User has made no preference regarding reduced transparency

Media Query: Transparency Reduce.description: User has requested the system minimize the amount of transparent or translucent layer effects

Media Query: Data No Preference.description: User has made no preference regarding reduced data

Media Query: Data Reduce.description: User has expressed the preference for lightweight alternate content

Media Query: Scheme Dark.description: User has requested a dark color theme

Media Query: Scheme Light.description: User has requested a light color theme

Media Query: Contrast More.description: User has requested a higher contrast theme

Media Query: Contrast Less.description: User has requested a lower contrast theme

Media Query: Inverted Colors.description: Colors are inverted by the OS

Media Query: Forced Colors Active.description: User has enabled a forced colors mode (like Windows High Contrast)

Media Query: Landscape.description: Viewport is in a landscape orientation

Media Query: HDR Display.description: Device supports high dynamic range (HDR) or P3 wide color gamut

Media Query: Touch Interface.description: Primary input is a touch screen (Phones, Tablets)

Media Query: Stylus on Non-Hover.description: Primary input is a stylus on a screen without hover

Media Query: Hover with Coarse Pointer.description: Primary input has hover but is coarse (e.g. Nintendo Wii controller)

Media Query: Mouse / Desktop.description: Primary input is a mouse or trackpad
